metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for lifeline — the auditable, coverage-honest dev lifecycle that runs anywhere and hands off to humans.

plugins.name: lifeline
plugins.description: Full dev lifecycle (spec → plan → build → review → test → merge, + debug lane) with coverage→smoke seeding, reviewer/QA handoff docs, an auditable artifact trail, and a portable core. FULL tier on Cursor ≥ 2.4 (parallel subagents, native Q&A, hard hook gates), with documented fallbacks on headless/older sessions.
